class.name: ASEffectSpec
class.description: [ASEffectSpec] represents an active effect. It stores the remaining duration and calculated magnitudes.

method.name: get_duration_remaining
method.description: Returns time left before effect ends.

method.name: get_level
method.description: Returns the power level of the effect instance.

method.name: get_magnitude
method.description: Returns the calculated modifier value for an attribute.

method.name: get_period_timer
method.description: Returns the time remaining until the next periodic tick.

method.name: get_source_attribute_value
method.description: Returns the value of an attribute on the source component.

method.name: get_source_component
method.description: Returns the ASC that applied this effect.

method.name: get_stack_count
method.description: Returns the current number of stacks for this effect.

method.name: get_target_attribute_value
method.description: Returns the value of an attribute on the target component.

method.name: get_target_component
method.description: Returns the destination component where the effect is applied.

method.name: init
method.description: Initializes the effect specification with a definition and level.

method.name: set_duration_remaining
method.description: Sets the remaining time for the effect.

method.name: set_level
method.description: Sets the power level of this instance.

method.name: set_magnitude
method.description: Manually sets the calculated magnitude for an attribute.

method.name: set_period_timer
method.description: Sets the internal timer for the next periodic tick.

members.member: Impact position (Vector2 or Vector3) usually associated with a collision query.
The target Object/Node that the effect is applied to or interacting with.
